chunks.title: Assassination of Gedaliah and the Pilgrims
chunks.reason: Narrative unit covering the murder of Gedaliah and the subsequent slaughter of eighty pilgrims.

chunks.title: Capture and Rescue of the Remnant
chunks.reason: Narrative unit detailing Ishmael taking captives to Ammon and Johanan's intervention to recover them.

chunks.title: Flight to Egypt
chunks.reason: Narrative unit describing the movement of the survivors to Geruth Chimham and their fear of the Chaldeans.
